input.question: How does average GPA vary by year of enrollment?

payload.question: How does average GPA vary by year of enrollment?

output.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(enrollment_year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)) AS enrollment_year,
  AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS count_students
FROM students
WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL
  AND (enrollment_year IS NOT NULL OR enrollment_date IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY COALESCE(enrollment_year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date))
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;

visualization.description: Average GPA by year of enrollment
visualization.title: Average GPA by Year of Enrollment

payload.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(enrollment_year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)) AS enrollment_year,
  AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS count_students
FROM students
WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL
  AND (enrollment_year IS NOT NULL OR enrollment_date IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY COALESCE(enrollment_year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date))
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;
